parameters.content:
## AI Content Tone Rewriter — GPT-4o-mini + Google Drive + Slack

For content teams, copywriters, and agencies who write the same message repeatedly in different styles for different audiences. Submit any text via the form — email, blog paragraph, social caption, proposal, or product description. GPT-4o-mini rewrites it in five distinct tones simultaneously: Professional, Casual, Persuasive, Concise, and Empathetic. All five versions are assembled into one Google Doc saved to your Drive folder. Slack gets an instant preview of the Concise version so your team can act immediately.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Content Tone Rewriter** collects the original text, content type, project name, and target audience
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores Drive folder ID, Slack channel, company name, and maps all form fields
- **3. AI Agent — Tone Rewriter** uses GPT-4o-mini to rewrite the text in all five tones at once
- **6. Code — Assemble Document Content** builds the full doc text with all five versions and the Slack preview message
- **7. Code — Convert to Binary** encodes the doc as a binary file for Drive upload
- **8. Google Drive — Upload Tone Doc** saves the complete five-version document to your Drive folder
- **9. Slack — Send Concise Preview** posts the Concise version as a quick team preview

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID, YOUR-SLACK-CHANNEL, and YOUR COMPANY NAME
2. In **4. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **8. Google Drive — Upload Tone Doc** — connect your Google Drive OAuth2 credential
4. In **9. Slack — Send Concise Preview** — connect your Slack OAuth2 credential and invite the bot to your channel
5. Activate the workflow and copy the Form URL from node 1

## Form Input and Config
Form collects the original text, content type, project name, and target audience. Config stores Drive folder ID, Slack channel, company name, and builds the document title and run timestamp.

## AI Tone Rewriting
GPT-4o-mini rewrites the original text in five tones simultaneously. Structured Output Parser enforces that all five versions are always returned: Professional, Casual, Persuasive, Concise, and Empathetic.

## Document Assembly
Builds the full Google Doc content — original text plus all five tone versions with clear section headers. Also prepares the Slack preview message showing the Concise version.

## Google Drive Upload
Converts the assembled text to binary format, then uploads it as a document to the configured Drive folder. File is named with project name and date.

## Slack Preview
Posts the Concise tone version to your Slack channel as an instant team preview. Full five-version document is always in Google Drive.

## ⚠️ Edit This Node Before Activating
Replace three values: YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID (from Drive folder URL after /folders/), YOUR-SLACK-CHANNEL (include the # symbol), and YOUR COMPANY NAME.

values.placeholder: Paste your email, blog paragraph, social caption, proposal, or any text here...
e.g. C-suite executives, young professionals, general public

parameters.formDescription: Paste your text below. AI will rewrite it in 5 different tones and save all versions to Google Drive.

assignments.name: docTitle
assignments.value: =Tone Rewrites — {{ $json['Your Name or Project Name'] }} — {{ $now.toFormat('dd MMM yyyy') }}

parameters.text:
=You are a professional content writer and tone specialist working for {{ $json.companyName }}.

You will rewrite the following text in exactly 5 different tones.

ORIGINAL TEXT:
{{ $json.originalText }}

CONTENT TYPE: {{ $json.contentType }}
TARGET AUDIENCE: {{ $json.targetAudience }}

Rewrite the text in ALL 5 tones below. Keep the core message and meaning identical in all versions. Only the tone and style should change.

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with exactly these 5 keys. No extra text before or after. No markdown. No backticks.

professional — Formal, polished, authoritative. Suitable for corporate communication, executive emails, or formal proposals. Use complete sentences and precise language.

casual — Warm, conversational, approachable. Like talking to a friend or colleague. Use contractions, simpler words, light energy.

persuasive — Compelling, action-oriented, benefit-focused. Use power words. Make the reader want to act. Clear call to action if appropriate.

concise — Strip everything to the bare minimum. Every word earns its place. Under 60 words if possible. No filler, no padding.

empathetic — Warm, understanding, human. Acknowledge the reader's perspective. Show you care about their situation or needs. Gentle and supportive tone.

RULES:
- Each version must be a complete, usable piece of writing.
- Do not add labels like Professional: or Tone 1: inside the values.
- Plain text only in each value. No markdown symbols.
- Keep each version between 40 and 120 words (except concise which can be shorter).
